PLAINTIFF ANGELA JENKINS' Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents And Further Responses; Request For Sanctions Of $4,897.50 From Defendant And Counsel For Defendant:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoenas For Mental Health Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STARBUCKS CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoenas For Mental Health Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Defendant Starbucks' motion to compel compliance with subpoenas for mental health records is granted. No monetary sanctions are imposed against either party.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena To Patricia Ann Davis, Mft Seeking Plaintiffs Medical Records; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,435 Against Counsel For Defendant And Defendant
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANGELA JENKINS' Motion To Quash Subpoena To Patricia Ann Davis, Mft Seeking Plaintiffs Medical Records; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,435 Against Counsel For Defendant And Defendant.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to quash subpoena to Patricia Ann Davis, MFT seeking plaintiff's medical records is denied. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena To Chaplain Carolyn Talmadge Seeking Plaintiffs Medical And Penitential Records; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,435 Against Counsel For Defendant And Defendant
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANGELA JENKINS' Motion To Quash Subpoena To Chaplain Carolyn Talmadge Seeking Plaintiffs Medical And Penitential Records; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,435 Against Counsel For Defendant And Defendant.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to quash subpoena to Chaplain Carolyn Talmadge seeking plaintiff's medical and penitential records is denied without prejudice to resolution of the issues in connection with Starbucks' pending motion to compel compliance with subpoenas for mental health records. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
